elements.name: Receiving Partial Qty from an ASN- Single Line
elements.description:
Creating ASN through Post Message UI, Complete receiving of partial qty, Verify the ASN Manually & validate new ASN is
automatically created with remaining qty

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user update "Single Line PO" for dropping into fedexnet application
user logs into the FedexNet application
user upload "856" XML file in fedexnet
user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Recv-CASE" menu
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "30 - Receiving Started"
validates the PIX message "606 - Un-allocable inventory adjustments"
user verifies the ASN "40 - Receiving Verified"
validates the PIX message "603 - Verify receipt"
user verifies new ASN is created with remaining qty
user log out from application

elements.name: Receiving Partial Qty from both the lines of an ASN- Multi Line
elements.description:
Creating ASN through Post Message UI, Complete receiving of partial qty from both the lines, Verify the ASN Manually & 
validate new multi line ASN is automatically created with remaining qty for both lines

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user update "Multi Line PO" for dropping into fedexnet application
user logs into the FedexNet application
user upload "856" XML file in fedexnet
user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"

elements.name: Receiving 1st line with all quantities and 2nd line with partial quantities of an ASN
elements.description:
Creating ASN through Post Message UI, Complete receiving 1st line with all quantities and 2nd line with partial 
quantities of an ASN , Verify the ASN Manually & validate new multi line ASN is automatically created with 
remaining qty

steps.name: I have excel data
Open the chrome browser by selenium
user update "Multi Line PO" for dropping into fedexnet application
user logs into the FedexNet application
user upload "856" XML file in fedexnet
user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user views ASN, get and verify item details
user opens RF menu and completes Receiving using "MM3 Recv-CASE" menu
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "30 - Receiving Started"
validates the PIX message "606 - Un-allocable inventory adjustments"
user verifies the ASN "40 - Receiving Verified"
validates the PIX message "603 - Verify receipt"
user verifies new ASN is created with remaining qty
user log out from application

elements.name: Receiving 1st line with more than shipped quantities and 2nd line with partial quantities - Different item in both lines
elements.description:
Creating ASN through Post Message UI, 1st line is Over Received and 2nd line with partial quantities of an 
ASN- Multi Line with different items such that received units must be equals to Total shipped units, Verify 
the ASN Manually & validate new ASN is automatically created with remaining qty from 2nd line

user log out from Fedenxet application
user logs into the Manhattan application
user opens ASN screen and searches for the ASN and verify its status "20 - InTransit"
user views ASN, get and verify item details
